metadata.sourceNotes: Amorgos second low/no-source batch 2026-05-26: Amorgos municipality confirms Paradisia as a small south-Amorgos sandy/pebble beach near Kolofana, reachable by car, with no shade and only a small kiosk during high season. Unsupported parking claim removed.

metadata.sourceNotes: Amorgos second low/no-source batch 2026-05-26: AllOverGreece identifies Finikies as the first beach on the way to Lefkes after Minoa, reached by a small track from the main dirt road, deserted, pebble, no organization, no shade, and boat/path access. Mapcarta/Wikimedia support beach identity/location.

accessNotes.en: To Go Amorgos kai Aegialis Hotel topothetoyn ton Chochlaka meta ti Levroso kai tin Psili Ammo, me prosvasi me perpatima apo to monopati i me varka apo ton Ormo Aigialis.
accessNotes.gr: Το Go Amorgos και Aegialis Hotel τοποθετούν τον Χόχλακα μετά τη Λεβρωσό και την Ψιλή Άμμο, με πρόσβαση με περπάτημα από το μονοπάτι ή με βάρκα από τον Όρμο Αιγιάλης.

metadata.sourceNotes: Amorgos final low/no-source batch 2026-05-26: Go Amorgos identifies Hochlakas/Chochlakas as the third Aegiali-side beach after Levrossos and Psili Ammos, with sand/pebbles and access by walking or boat from Ormos Aegiali. Aegialis Hotel supports quiet, wild, non-organized cove context. No services added.

metadata.sourceNotes: Amorgos final low/no-source batch 2026-05-26: Go Amorgos and Amorgos Island identify Psili Ammos after Levrossos, reachable by path or boat from Aegiali. Aegialis Hotel describes it as quiet, non-organized, sandy/pebbly, with some trees on the upper beach providing shade. No services added.

metadata.sourceNotes: Amorgos final low/no-source batch 2026-05-26: Visit Greece lists Mikri Vlychada as a quiet secluded pebbly beach reached from Tholaria by a demanding footpath. AllOverGreece supports sand/pebble, boat/path access, isolated, unorganized, no shade context. Aegialis/Vigla sources support Tholaria steep/rocky 30-40 min path or private boat access.
